# Marilyn's Morsels Bakery

> Marilyn's Morsels Bakery is a small-batch home bakery in Westerville, Ohio, specializing in fresh-baked cookies and cookie dough. Orders are available online for local delivery within approximately 10 miles of Westerville and nationwide shipping (cookies only). The bakery is family-run by Marilyn, whose recipes have been perfected over decades of baking for family, friends, and neighbors. Contact: marilynsmorselsbakery@gmail.com

## About

Learn about Marilyn and the story behind the bakery.
- https://marilynsmorsels.com/about

## Shop

Order small-batch cookies and cookie dough online. Available products include:
- The Old Fashion Chocolate Chip Cookie (half-dozen, dozen, 2-dozen)
- Cowboy Cookie (half-dozen, dozen, 2-dozen)
- Peanut Butter Cup Sugar Cookies (half-dozen, dozen, 2-dozen)
- The Sequel — a half & half package of any two cookie varieties
- Plush Trio — all three cookie varieties in one package
- Cookie Dough in three flavors (pint, quart, half-gallon)

Browse and order at: https://marilynsmorsels.com/shop

## Bulk & Corporate Orders

For large-quantity orders for events, corporate gifts, or special occasions.
- https://marilynsmorsels.com/bulk-orders

## FAQ

Common questions about ordering, shipping, freshness, allergens, and storage.
- https://marilynsmorsels.com/faq
